refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: corners = imcorner(image) corners = imcorner(image, maxCorners, qualityLevel, minDistance)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns [x y] image coordinates for Shi-Tomasi-style corners detected from the grayscale image. Image coordinates use the upper-left origin. Convert them with rect2cart before overlaying them with Scilab plot, whose y-axis uses a lower-left Cartesian origin.

refsection.title: Examples
